summary: Descriptive overview of vicariousliability in substantive law: respondeat superior, scope of employment, frolic/detour.
key_points: respondeat superior is a fundamental concept in tort law.
Legal standards for vicariousliability are established through case law and statutory interpretation.
Courts apply specific tests to determine vicariousliability in litigation.
The doctrine of vicariousliability has evolved through Supreme Court precedents.
Understanding vicariousliability requires analysis of both historical context and modern applications.
philosophy_guard_statement: This fragment describes existing legal doctrines and their applications without advocating for normative changes.
